videos.headline: Luke Altmyer throws it up to Tanner Arkin for an Illinois TD
videos.description: Luke Altmyer throws it to the back of the end zone, and Tanner Arkin comes down with it to extend Illinois' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Luke Altmyer throws it up to Tanner Arkin for an Illinois TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kalel Mullings leaps into the end zone for a Michigan TD
videos.description: Kalel Mullings gets Michigan on the board with a 1-yard rushing touchdown on fourth-and-goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kalel Mullings leaps into the end zone for a Michigan TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Illinois' Luke Altmyer scores on QB keeper
videos.description: Luke Altmyer sneaks it up the middle to extend Illinois' lead over Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Illinois’ Luke Altmyer scores on QB keeper) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
